title: R2-T2: Re-Routing in Test-Time for Multimodal Mixture-of-Experts
authors: Not specified in the provided text
abstract: R2-T2 is a method for optimizing routing weights in test-time for multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models, addressing issues of modality imbalance and information bottlenecks in vision-language models.
problem_addressed: Information bottleneck from visual perception to reasoning
Suboptimal expert selection in multimodal MoE models

proposed_solution.name: R2-T2
proposed_solution.description: Optimizes routing weights at test-time by finding similar cases from a reference set and adjusting expert selection accordingly.
proposed_solution.method: Uses k-nearest neighbors (kNN) from correctly predicted samples to adjust routing weights.

key_findings: R2-T2 can correct initial wrong predictions by shifting from suboptimal experts
Improved performance on spatial reasoning tasks
